auth.title:
Your AI.
Your hardware.
Your data.
auth.subtitle: A local workspace for research, documents, and code — without an external AI API.

chat.hint: Ask a question, analyze a file, or begin secure research.

research.title: Multiple sources, one clear answer.
research.subtitle: Public HTTPS pages only. Local addresses, unsafe redirects, and prompt injection are blocked.
research.placeholder: What would you like to research reliably?
research.empty: Your verified research will appear here.

files.title: Analyze files, never execute them blindly.
files.subtitle: Type, size, hash, archives, PDF content, code risks, and manipulative instructions are checked.
files.drop: Drop a file here or choose one
files.formats: TXT, PDF, code, JSON, ZIP, TAR, 7Z, and more

projects.title: From brief to reviewed ZIP project.
projects.subtitle: The local model creates complete files, checksums, and a security report.
projects.name: Project name
projects.placeholder: Describe features, target platform, design, and requirements …

knowledge.title: Knowledge with provenance and confidence.
knowledge.subtitle: Notes do not automatically become truth. Confirmation stays controlled.

history.title: Your history stays with you.
history.subtitle: Search, archive, or permanently delete conversations.

settings.title: Settings & privacy
settings.subtitle: Appearance, sessions, exports, and account security.
settings.dataHint: Download account data, chats, feedback, and your knowledge entries as JSON.
settings.signoutHint: You can securely sign out at any time.

admin.title: Administration
admin.subtitle: Hardware, local model, users, and security events.
